# Public FOM Baseline Source Index

## RPR FOM 2.0 normative annex modules
- id: `rpr-normative`
- repository: `mcgredonps/HLAGenerator`

- round-trip mode: `fedpro-json-original-xml`
- license note: RPR XML modules embed SISO attribution text; preserve upstream contents unchanged.
